title: Urraca of León becomes Queen of the Kingdom of León
fact: Urraca, called the Reckless (La Temeraria), was Queen of León, Castile and Galicia from 1109 until her death.

title: Alfonso VI of León and Castile becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Alfonso VI, nicknamed the Brave or the Valiant, was king of León (1065–1109), Galicia (1071–1109), and Castile (1072–1109).

title: Alfonso VII of Castile becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Alfonso VII, called the Emperor, became the King of Galicia in 1111 and King of León and Castile in 1126.

title: Ferdinand II of León becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Ferdinand II, was a member of the Castilian cadet branch of the House of Ivrea and King of León and Galicia from 1157 until his death.

title: Sancho II of León and Castile becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Sancho II, called the Strong, was King of Castile (1065–72), Galicia (1071–72) and León (1072).

title: Ramiro II of León becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Ramiro II, son of Ordoño II and Elvira Menendez, was a King of León from 931 until his death.

title: Alfonso V of León becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Alfonso V, called the Noble, was King of León from 999 to 1028.

title: Bermudo II of León becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Bermudo II, called the Gouty, was first a rival king in Galicia (982–984) and then king of the entire Kingdom of León (984–999).

title: Ordoño II of León becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Ordoño II was a king of Galicia from 910, and king of Galicia and León from 914 until his death.

title: Sancha of León becomes Queen of the Kingdom of León
fact: Sancha of León was infanta and queen of León.

title: García I of León becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: García I was the King of León from 910 until his death and eldest of three succeeding sons of Alfonso III of Asturias by his wife Jimena.

title: Fruela II of Asturias becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Fruela II was the king of Asturias from 910 to 924 and king of León from 924 to 925.

title: Bermudo III of León becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Bermudo III or Vermudo III was the king of León from 1028 until his death.

title: Alfonso IV of León becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Alfonso IV, called the Monk, was King of León from 925 and King of Galicia from 929, until he abdicated in 931.

title: Ordoño III of León becomes King of the Kingdom of León
fact: Ordoño III was the King of León from 951 to 956, son and successor of Ramiro II (931–951).
